finding_results.notes: Martha's accusation now carries into the hospital-wing corridor, where Owen follows, is physically and socially shut out, and then retreats instead of re-entering. The ward-scar investigation resumes only after that relational consequence changes his movement and access.
finding_results.summary: Added a concrete on-page aftershock to Martha's 'you had it ready' accusation before the old-work mystery takes over.

finding_results.notes: Each explanation beat now carries a separate failure mode: waking the rule, spread from strikes to holds, redirected injury into secondary impacts, overload rebounding through Owen's arm, and Crucio escaping into the Hall itself.
finding_results.summary: Compressed and differentiated the punishment exposition so later explanations introduce new costs instead of restating the same contact logic.

summary: Chapter 6 now gives Martha's accusation immediate relational consequence and tightens the punishment sequence so each analytic beat adds a distinct new problem.
